1→package dev.tuist.gradle
     2→
     3→import com.google.gson.Gson
     4→import com.google.gson.annotations.SerializedName
     5→import org.gradle.api.Plugin
     6→import org.gradle.api.Project
     7→import org.gradle.api.internal.GradleInternal
     8→import org.gradle.api.logging.Logging
     9→import org.gradle.api.provider.Property
    10→import org.gradle.api.services.BuildService
    11→import org.gradle.api.services.BuildServiceParameters
    12→import org.gradle.api.tasks.CacheableTask
    13→import org.gradle.build.event.BuildEventsListenerRegistry
    14→import org.gradle.caching.internal.operations.BuildCacheArchivePackBuildOperationType
    15→import org.gradle.caching.internal.operations.BuildCacheLocalLoadBuildOperationType
    16→import org.gradle.caching.internal.operations.BuildCacheRemoteLoadBuildOperationType
    17→import org.gradle.api.internal.tasks.execution.ExecuteTaskBuildOperationType
    18→import org.gradle.internal.operations.BuildOperationDescriptor
    19→import org.gradle.internal.operations.BuildOperationListener
    20→import org.gradle.internal.operations.BuildOperationListenerManager
    21→import org.gradle.internal.operations.OperationFinishEvent
    22→import org.gradle.internal.operations.OperationIdentifier
    23→import org.gradle.internal.operations.OperationProgressEvent
    24→import org.gradle.internal.operations.OperationStartEvent
    25→import org.gradle.tooling.events.FinishEvent
    26→import org.gradle.tooling.events.OperationCompletionListener
    27→import org.gradle.tooling.events.task.TaskFinishEvent
    28→import org.gradle.tooling.events.task.TaskFailureResult
    29→import org.gradle.tooling.events.task.TaskSkippedResult
    30→import org.gradle.tooling.events.task.TaskSuccessResult
    31→import java.io.BufferedReader
    32→import java.io.InputStreamReader
    33→import java.io.OutputStreamWriter
    34→import java.net.HttpURLConnection
    35→import java.net.URI
    36→import java.time.Instant
    37→import java.time.ZoneOffset
    38→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    39→import java.util.UUID
    40→import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap
    41→import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentLinkedQueue
    42→import javax.inject.Inject
    43→
    44→// --- Data classes ---
    45→
    46→enum class CacheHitType { LOCAL, REMOTE, MISS }
    47→
    48→enum class TaskOutcome(val value: String) {
    49→    @SerializedName("local_hit") LOCAL_HIT("local_hit"),
    50→    @SerializedName("remote_hit") REMOTE_HIT("remote_hit"),
    51→    @SerializedName("up_to_date") UP_TO_DATE("up_to_date"),
    52→    @SerializedName("executed") EXECUTED("executed"),
    53→    @SerializedName("failed") FAILED("failed"),
    54→    @SerializedName("skipped") SKIPPED("skipped"),
    55→    @SerializedName("no_source") NO_SOURCE("no_source");
    56→}
    57→
    58→data class TaskCacheMetadata(
    59→    val cacheKey: String? = null,
    60→    val artifactSize: Long? = null,
    61→    val cacheHitType: CacheHitType = CacheHitType.MISS
    62→)
    63→
    64→data class TaskOutcomeData(
    65→    val taskPath: String,
    66→    val outcome: TaskOutcome,
    67→    val cacheable: Boolean,
    68→    val durationMs: Long,
    69→    val cacheKey: String?,
    70→    val cacheArtifactSize: Long?,
    71→    val startedAt: String?
    72→)
    73→
    74→data class TaskReportEntry(
    75→    @SerializedName("task_path") val taskPath: String,
    76→    val outcome: TaskOutcome,
    77→    val cacheable: Boolean,
    78→    @SerializedName("duration_ms") val durationMs: Long,
    79→    @SerializedName("cache_key") val cacheKey: String?,
    80→    @SerializedName("cache_artifact_size") val cacheArtifactSize: Long?,
    81→    @SerializedName("started_at") val startedAt: String?
    82→)
    83→
    84→data class BuildReportRequest(
    85→    val id: String,
    86→    @SerializedName("duration_ms") val durationMs: Long,
    87→    val status: String,
    88→    @SerializedName("gradle_version") val gradleVersion: String?,
    89→    @SerializedName("java_version") val javaVersion: String?,
    90→    @SerializedName("is_ci") val isCi: Boolean,
    91→    @SerializedName("git_branch") val gitBranch: String?,
    92→    @SerializedName("git_commit_sha") val gitCommitSha: String?,
    93→    @SerializedName("git_ref") val gitRef: String?,
    94→    @SerializedName("root_project_name") val rootProjectName: String?,
    95→    val tasks: List<TaskReportEntry>
    96→)
    97→
    98→data class BuildReportResponse(val id: String)
    99→
   100→// --- Build Service ---
   101→
   102→abstract class TuistBuildInsightsService :
   103→    BuildService<TuistBuildInsightsService.Params>,
   104→    OperationCompletionListener,
   105→    BuildOperationListener,
   106→    AutoCloseable {
   107→
   108→    interface Params : BuildServiceParameters {
   109→        val url: Property<String>
   110→        val project: Property<String>
   111→        val executablePath: Property<String>
   112→        val gradleVersion: Property<String>
   113→        val rootProjectName: Property<String>
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    private val logger = Logging.getLogger(TuistBuildInsightsService::class.java)
   117→
   118→    internal var gitInfoProvider: GitInfoProvider = ProcessGitInfoProvider()
   119→    internal var ciDetector: CIDetector = EnvironmentCIDetector()
   120→    internal var uploadInBackground: Boolean? = null
   121→
   122→    val buildId: String = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
   123→
   124→    private val taskOutcomes = ConcurrentLinkedQueue<TaskOutcomeData>()
   125→    private val cacheableTaskPaths: MutableSet<String> = ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet()
   126→    private var buildStartTime: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
   127→    @Volatile private var buildFailed = false
   128→
   129→    internal var listenerManager: BuildOperationListenerManager? = null
   130→    private val operationParents = ConcurrentHashMap<OperationIdentifier, OperationIdentifier>()
   131→    private val operationTaskPaths = ConcurrentHashMap<OperationIdentifier, String>()
   132→    private val taskCacheMetadata = ConcurrentHashMap<String, TaskCacheMetadata>()
   133→
   134→    fun setCacheableTasks(paths: Set<String>) {
   135→        cacheableTaskPaths.addAll(paths)
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    override fun started(buildOperation: BuildOperationDescriptor, startEvent: OperationStartEvent) {
   139→        val opId = buildOperation.id ?: return
   140→        val parentId = buildOperation.parentId
   141→        if (parentId != null) {
   142→            operationParents[opId] = parentId
   143→        }
   144→
   145→        val details = buildOperation.details
   146→        if (details is ExecuteTaskBuildOperationType.Details) {
   147→            operationTaskPaths[opId] = details.taskPath
   148→        }
   149→    }
   150→
   151→    override fun progress(operationIdentifier: OperationIdentifier, progressEvent: OperationProgressEvent) {
   152→        // No-op
   153→    }
   154→
   155→    override fun finished(buildOperation: BuildOperationDescriptor, finishEvent: OperationFinishEvent) {
   156→        val result = finishEvent.result
   157→        val details = buildOperation.details
   158→        val opId = buildOperation.id ?: return
   159→
   160→        when (result) {
   161→            is BuildCacheLocalLoadBuildOperationType.Result -> {
   162→                if (result.isHit) {
   163→                    val taskPath = findTaskPathForOperation(opId) ?: return
   164→                    val cacheKey = (details as? BuildCacheLocalLoadBuildOperationType.Details)?.cacheKey
   165→                    val existing = taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] ?: TaskCacheMetadata()
   166→                    taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] = existing.copy(
   167→                        cacheKey = cacheKey,
   168→                        artifactSize = result.archiveSize,
   169→                        cacheHitType = CacheHitType.LOCAL
   170→                    )
   171→                }
   172→            }
   173→            is BuildCacheRemoteLoadBuildOperationType.Result -> {
   174→                if (result.isHit) {
   175→                    val taskPath = findTaskPathForOperation(opId) ?: return
   176→                    val cacheKey = (details as? BuildCacheRemoteLoadBuildOperationType.Details)?.cacheKey
   177→                    val existing = taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] ?: TaskCacheMetadata()
   178→                    taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] = existing.copy(
   179→                        cacheKey = cacheKey,
   180→                        artifactSize = result.archiveSize,
   181→                        cacheHitType = CacheHitType.REMOTE
   182→                    )
   183→                }
   184→            }
   185→            is BuildCacheArchivePackBuildOperationType.Result -> {
   186→                val taskPath = findTaskPathForOperation(opId) ?: return
   187→                val cacheKey = (details as? BuildCacheArchivePackBuildOperationType.Details)?.cacheKey
   188→                val existing = taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] ?: TaskCacheMetadata()
   189→                taskCacheMetadata[taskPath] = existing.copy(
   190→                    cacheKey = cacheKey,
   191→                    artifactSize = result.archiveSize
   192→                )
   193→            }
   194→        }
   195→
   196→        // Clean up when task-level operations finish
   197→        if (buildOperation.details is ExecuteTaskBuildOperationType.Details) {
   198→            operationTaskPaths.remove(opId)
   199→        }
   200→        operationParents.remove(opId)
   201→    }
   202→
   203→    /**
   204→     * Walks up the operation tree to find which Gradle task a nested build operation belongs to.
   205→     *
   206→     * Gradle's BuildOperationListener fires for operations at many levels — a cache load/store
   207→     * operation is a child of the task execution operation, not the task itself. This method
   208→     * follows [operationParents] (child → parent mappings recorded in [started]) upward until
   209→     * it finds an operation that has an entry in [operationTaskPaths] (populated when an
   210→     * ExecuteTaskBuildOperationType starts).
   211→     *
   212→     * For example, for a chain like `Task(:app:compileKotlin) → CacheLoad → …`, it walks from
   213→     * the cache load op up to the task op and returns `:app:compileKotlin`.
   214→     */
   215→    private fun findTaskPathForOperation(opId: OperationIdentifier): String? {
   216→        var currentId: OperationIdentifier? = opId
   217→        while (currentId != null) {
   218→            operationTaskPaths[currentId]?.let { return it }
   219→            currentId = operationParents[currentId]
   220→        }
   221→        return null
   222→    }
   223→
   224→    override fun onFinish(event: FinishEvent) {
   225→        if (event !is TaskFinishEvent) return
   226→        val result = event.result
   227→        val taskPath = event.descriptor.taskPath
   228→        val durationMs = result.endTime - result.startTime
   229→        val metadata = taskCacheMetadata[taskPath]
   230→
   231→        val (outcome, cacheable) = when (result) {
   232→            is TaskSuccessResult -> {
   233→                when {
   234→                    result.isFromCache -> {
   235→                        val outcome = when (metadata?.cacheHitType) {
   236→                            CacheHitType.REMOTE -> TaskOutcome.REMOTE_HIT
   237→                            else -> TaskOutcome.LOCAL_HIT
   238→                        }
   239→                        outcome to true
   240→                    }
   241→                    result.isUpToDate -> TaskOutcome.UP_TO_DATE to cacheableTaskPaths.contains(taskPath)
   242→                    else -> TaskOutcome.EXECUTED to cacheableTaskPaths.contains(taskPath)
   243→                }
   244→            }
   245→            is TaskFailureResult -> {
   246→                buildFailed = true
   247→                TaskOutcome.FAILED to cacheableTaskPaths.contains(taskPath)
   248→            }
   249→            is TaskSkippedResult -> {
   250→                val skipMessage = result.skipMessage ?: ""
   251→                val outcome = if (skipMessage.contains("NO-SOURCE", ignoreCase = true)) TaskOutcome.NO_SOURCE else TaskOutcome.SKIPPED
   252→                outcome to false
   253→            }
   254→            else -> TaskOutcome.EXECUTED to false
   255→        }
   256→
   257→        val startedAt = Instant.ofEpochMilli(result.startTime)
   258→            .atOffset(ZoneOffset.UTC)
   259→            .format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_OFFSET_DATE_TIME)
   260→
   261→        taskOutcomes.add(
   262→            TaskOutcomeData(
   263→                taskPath = taskPath,
   264→                outcome = outcome,
   265→                cacheable = cacheable,
   266→                durationMs = durationMs,
   267→                cacheKey = metadata?.cacheKey,
   268→                cacheArtifactSize = metadata?.artifactSize,
   269→                startedAt = startedAt
   270→            )
   271→        )
   272→
   273→        taskCacheMetadata.remove(taskPath)
   274→    }
   275→
   276→    override fun close() {
   277→        try {
   278→            listenerManager?.removeListener(this)
   279→        } catch (_: Exception) {}
   280→
   281→        val shouldUploadInBackground = uploadInBackground ?: !ciDetector.isCi()
   282→
   283→        if (shouldUploadInBackground) {
   284→            logger.lifecycle("Tuist: Uploading build insights in the background...")
   285→            Thread({
   286→                try {
   287→                    sendReport()
   288→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   289→                    logger.warn("Tuist: Failed to send build insights: ${e.message}")
   290→                }
   291→            }, "tuist-build-insights-upload").apply {
   292→                isDaemon = false
   293→                start()
   294→            }
   295→        } else {
   296→            try {
   297→                sendReport()
   298→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   299→                logger.warn("Tuist: Failed to send build insights: ${e.message}")
   300→            }
   301→        }
   302→    }
   303→
   304→    private fun sendReport() {
   305→        val projectValue = parameters.project.orNull
   306→
   307→        val configProvider = TuistCommandConfigurationProvider(
   308→            project = projectValue,
   309→            command = listOf(parameters.executablePath.orNull ?: "tuist"),
   310→            url = parameters.url.get(),
   311→            projectDir = java.io.File(System.getProperty("user.dir"))
   312→        )
   313→
   314→        val httpClient = TuistHttpClient(
   315→            configurationProvider = configProvider,
   316→            connectTimeoutMs = 10_000,
   317→            readTimeoutMs = 10_000
   318→        )
   319→
   320→        val totalDurationMs = System.currentTimeMillis() - buildStartTime
   321→
   322→        val report = buildReport(
   323→            id = buildId,
   324→            taskOutcomes = taskOutcomes.toList(),
   325→            buildFailed = buildFailed,
   326→            totalDurationMs = totalDurationMs,
   327→            gradleVersion = parameters.gradleVersion.orNull,
   328→            rootProjectName = parameters.rootProjectName.orNull,
   329→            ciDetector = ciDetector,
   330→            gitInfoProvider = gitInfoProvider
   331→        )
   332→
   333→        val response = httpClient.execute { config ->
   334→            val baseUrl = parameters.url.get().trimEnd('/')
   335→            val url = URI(baseUrl).resolve("/api/projects/${config.accountHandle}/${config.projectHandle}/gradle/builds")
   336→            val connection = httpClient.openConnection(url, config)
   337→            try {
   338→                connection.requestMethod = "POST"
   339→                connection.doOutput = true
   340→                connection.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "application/json")
   341→
   342→                OutputStreamWriter(connection.outputStream, Charsets.UTF_8).use { writer ->
   343→                    Gson().toJson(report, writer)
   344→                }
   345→
   346→                when (connection.responseCode) {
   347→                    HttpURLConnection.HTTP_CREATED -> {
   348→                        BufferedReader(InputStreamReader(connection.inputStream, Charsets.UTF_8)).use { reader ->
   349→                            Gson().fromJson(reader, BuildReportResponse::class.java)
   350→                        }
   351→                    }
   352→                    HttpURLConnection.HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED -> throw TokenExpiredException()
   353→                    else -> {
   354→                        val errorBody = try {
   355→                            connection.errorStream?.bufferedReader()?.use { it.readText() }
   356→                        } catch (_: Exception) { null }
   357→                        logger.warn("Tuist: Build insights request failed with HTTP ${connection.responseCode}: ${errorBody ?: "(no response body)"}")
   358→                        null
   359→                    }
   360→                }
   361→            } finally {
   362→                connection.disconnect()
   363→            }
   364→        }
   365→
   366→        if (response != null) {
   367→            logger.lifecycle("Tuist: Build insights reported successfully (build $buildId)")
   368→        } else {
   369→            logger.warn("Tuist: Failed to report build insights.")
   370→        }
   371→    }
   372→}
   373→
   374→internal fun buildReport(
   375→    id: String,
   376→    taskOutcomes: List<TaskOutcomeData>,
   377→    buildFailed: Boolean,
   378→    totalDurationMs: Long,
   379→    gradleVersion: String? = null,
   380→    rootProjectName: String? = null,
   381→    ciDetector: CIDetector = EnvironmentCIDetector(),
   382→    gitInfoProvider: GitInfoProvider = ProcessGitInfoProvider()
   383→): BuildReportRequest {
   384→    val status = when {
   385→        buildFailed -> "failure"
   386→        taskOutcomes.any { it.outcome == TaskOutcome.FAILED } -> "failure"
   387→        else -> "success"
   388→    }
   389→
   390→    return BuildReportRequest(
   391→        id = id,
   392→        durationMs = totalDurationMs,
   393→        status = status,
   394→        gradleVersion = gradleVersion,
   395→        javaVersion = System.getProperty("java.version"),
   396→        isCi = ciDetector.isCi(),
   397→        gitBranch = gitInfoProvider.branch(),
   398→        gitCommitSha = gitInfoProvider.commitSha(),
   399→        gitRef = gitInfoProvider.ref(),
   400→        rootProjectName = rootProjectName,
   401→        tasks = taskOutcomes.map { task ->
   402→            TaskReportEntry(
   403→                taskPath = task.taskPath,
   404→                outcome = task.outcome,
   405→                cacheable = task.cacheable,
   406→                durationMs = task.durationMs,
   407→                cacheKey = task.cacheKey,
   408→                cacheArtifactSize = task.cacheArtifactSize,
   409→                startedAt = task.startedAt
   410→            )
   411→        }
   412→    )
   413→}
   414→
   415→internal abstract class TuistBuildInsightsPlugin @Inject constructor(
   416→    private val eventsListenerRegistry: BuildEventsListenerRegistry
   417→) : Plugin<Project> {
   418→    private val logger = Logging.getLogger(TuistBuildInsightsPlugin::class.java)
   419→
   420→    override fun apply(project: Project) {
   421→        if (project !== project.rootProject) return
   422→
   423→        val config = TuistGradleConfig.from(project) ?: return
   424→
   425→        val serviceProvider = project.gradle.sharedServices.registerIfAbsent(
   426→            "tuistBuildInsights",
   427→            TuistBuildInsightsService::class.java
   428→        ) {
   429→            parameters.url.set(config.url)
   430→            config.project?.let { parameters.project.set(it) }
   431→            parameters.executablePath.set(config.executablePath)
   432→            parameters.gradleVersion.set(project.gradle.gradleVersion)
   433→            parameters.rootProjectName.set(project.rootProject.name)
   434→        }
   435→
   436→        eventsListenerRegistry.onTaskCompletion(serviceProvider)
   437→
   438→        project.gradle.taskGraph.whenReady {
   439→            val cacheablePaths = allTasks
   440→                .filter { task ->
   441→                    task.javaClass.isAnnotationPresent(CacheableTask::class.java)
   442→                }
   443→                .map { it.path }
   444→                .toSet()
   445→
   446→            val service = serviceProvider.get()
   447→            service.setCacheableTasks(cacheablePaths)
   448→            service.uploadInBackground = config.uploadInBackground
   449→
   450→            try {
   451→                val gradleInternal = project.gradle as GradleInternal
   452→                val manager = gradleInternal.services.get(BuildOperationListenerManager::class.java)
   453→                manager.addListener(service)
   454→                service.listenerManager = manager
   455→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   456→                logger.warn("Tuist: Could not register build operation listener. Cache metadata may be incomplete.")
   457→            }
   458→        }
   459→    }
   460→}
   461→
   462→

1→package dev.tuist.gradle
     2→
     3→import org.gradle.api.Plugin
     4→import org.gradle.api.initialization.Settings
     5→import org.gradle.api.logging.Logger
     6→import org.gradle.api.logging.Logging
     7→
     8→/**
     9→ * Main Tuist Gradle Settings Plugin.
    10→ *
    11→ * This plugin integrates Gradle projects with Tuist services including
    12→ * remote build caching and analytics.
    13→ *
    14→ * Usage in settings.gradle.kts:
    15→ * ```
    16→ * plugins {
    17→ *     id("dev.tuist") version "0.1.0"
    18→ * }
    19→ *
    20→ * tuist {
    21→ *     // Optional: if not set, the project is read from tuist.toml
    22→ *     // project = "account/project"
    23→ *
    24→ *     uploadInBackground = true // default: true locally, false on CI
    25→ *
    26→ *     buildCache {
    27→ *         enabled = true
    28→ *         push = true
    29→ *     }
    30→ * }
    31→ * ```
    32→ */
    33→/**
    34→ * Shared configuration passed from the settings plugin to project-level feature plugins.
    35→ */
    36→data class TuistGradleConfig(
    37→    val url: String,
    38→    val project: String?,
    39→    val executablePath: String,
    40→    val uploadInBackground: Boolean? = null,
    41→    val testQuarantineEnabled: Boolean? = null
    42→) {
    43→    companion object {
    44→        internal const val EXTRA_PROPERTY_KEY = "tuist.config"
    45→
    46→        fun from(project: org.gradle.api.Project): TuistGradleConfig? =
    47→            project.extensions.extraProperties.let {
    48→                if (it.has(EXTRA_PROPERTY_KEY)) it.get(EXTRA_PROPERTY_KEY) as? TuistGradleConfig else null
    49→            }
    50→    }
    51→}
    52→
    53→class TuistPlugin : Plugin<Settings> {
    54→
    55→    private val logger: Logger = Logging.getLogger(TuistPlugin::class.java)
    56→
    57→    override fun apply(settings: Settings) {
    58→        val extension = settings.extensions.create(
    59→            "tuist",
    60→            TuistExtension::class.java
    61→        )
    62→
    63→        // Register the custom build cache type
    64→        settings.buildCache.registerBuildCacheService(
    65→            TuistBuildCache::class.java,
    66→            TuistBuildCacheServiceFactory::class.java
    67→        )
    68→
    69→        settings.gradle.settingsEvaluated {
    70→            configure(settings, extension)
    71→        }
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    private fun configure(settings: Settings, extension: TuistExtension) {
    75→        configureBuildCache(settings, extension)
    76→        configureBuildInsights(settings, extension)
    77→        configureTestInsights(settings, extension)
    78→    }
    79→
    80→    private fun configureBuildInsights(settings: Settings, extension: TuistExtension) {
    81→        val project = extension.project.ifBlank { null }
    82→        settings.gradle.rootProject {
    83→            extensions.extraProperties.set(TuistGradleConfig.EXTRA_PROPERTY_KEY, TuistGradleConfig(
    84→                url = extension.url,
    85→                project = project,
    86→                executablePath = extension.executablePath ?: "tuist",
    87→                uploadInBackground = extension.uploadInBackground,
    88→                testQuarantineEnabled = extension.testQuarantine.enabled
    89→            ))
    90→            pluginManager.apply(TuistBuildInsightsPlugin::class.java)
    91→            val projectLabel = project ?: "(from tuist.toml)"
    92→            logger.lifecycle("Tuist: Build insights configured for $projectLabel")
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    private fun configureTestInsights(settings: Settings, extension: TuistExtension) {
    97→        val project = extension.project.ifBlank { null }
    98→        settings.gradle.rootProject {
    99→            pluginManager.apply(TuistTestInsightsPlugin::class.java)
   100→            val projectLabel = project ?: "(from tuist.toml)"
   101→            logger.lifecycle("Tuist: Test insights configured for $projectLabel")
   102→        }
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    private fun configureBuildCache(settings: Settings, extension: TuistExtension) {
   106→        val buildCacheConfig = extension.buildCache
   107→        if (!buildCacheConfig.enabled) {
   108→            logger.info("Tuist: Build cache is disabled.")
   109→            return
   110→        }
   111→
   112→        val project = extension.project.ifBlank { null }
   113→
   114→        settings.buildCache {
   115→            remote(TuistBuildCache::class.java) {
   116→                this.project = project
   117→                this.executablePath = extension.executablePath
   118→                this.url = extension.url
   119→                isPush = buildCacheConfig.push
   120→                this.allowInsecureProtocol = buildCacheConfig.allowInsecureProtocol
   121→            }
   122→        }
   123→
   124→        settings.gradle.rootProject {
   125→            val projectLabel = project ?: "(from tuist.toml)"
   126→            logger.lifecycle("Tuist: Remote build cache configured for $projectLabel")
   127→        }
   128→    }
   129→}
   130→
   131→/**
   132→ * Main extension for configuring Tuist integration.
   133→ */
   134→open class TuistExtension {
   135→    /**
   136→     * The project identifier in format "account/project".
   137→     * If not set, the plugin reads it from the tuist.toml file in the project root.
   138→     */
   139→    var project: String = ""
   140→
   141→    /**
   142→     * Path to the tuist executable. When null, the plugin will look for
   143→     * 'tuist' in the system PATH.
   144→     */
   145→    var executablePath: String? = null
   146→
   147→    /**
   148→     * The base URL that points to the Tuist server. Defaults to https://tuist.dev.
   149→     */
   150→    var url: String = "https://tuist.dev"
   151→
   152→    /**
   153→     * Whether to upload build insights in the background. When null (default),
   154→     * the upload runs in the background for local builds and in the foreground on CI
   155→     * to ensure it completes before ephemeral agents exit.
   156→     */
   157→    var uploadInBackground: Boolean? = null
   158→
   159→    /**
   160→     * Build cache configuration.
   161→     */
   162→    val buildCache: BuildCacheExtension = BuildCacheExtension()
   163→
   164→    /**
   165→     * Configure build cache settings.
   166→     */
   167→    fun buildCache(configure: BuildCacheExtension.() -> Unit) {
   168→        buildCache.configure()
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    /**
   172→     * Test quarantine configuration.
   173→     */
   174→    val testQuarantine: TestQuarantineExtension = TestQuarantineExtension()
   175→
   176→    /**
   177→     * Configure test quarantine settings.
   178→     */
   179→    fun testQuarantine(configure: TestQuarantineExtension.() -> Unit) {
   180→        testQuarantine.configure()
   181→    }
   182→}
   183→
   184→/**
   185→ * Configuration for Tuist build cache feature.
   186→ */
   187→open class BuildCacheExtension {
   188→    /**
   189→     * Whether the build cache feature is enabled. Defaults to true.
   190→     */
   191→    var enabled: Boolean = true
   192→
   193→    /**
   194→     * Whether to push build outputs to the remote cache. Defaults to true.
   195→     */
   196→    var push: Boolean = true
   197→
   198→    /**
   199→     * Whether to allow insecure HTTP connections. Defaults to false.
   200→     */
   201→    var allowInsecureProtocol: Boolean = false
   202→}
   203→
   204→/**
   205→ * Configuration for test quarantine feature.
   206→ * When enabled, quarantined (flaky) tests are automatically excluded from test runs.
   207→ */
   208→open class TestQuarantineExtension {
   209→    /**
   210→     * Whether test quarantine is enabled. When null (default), quarantine is
   211→     * automatically enabled on CI and disabled for local builds.
   212→     */
   213→    var enabled: Boolean? = null
   214→}
   215→
   216→

defmodule Tuist.Gradle.OTLPParser do
  @moduledoc false

  def parse_protobuf(binary) when is_binary(binary) do
    request = :opentelemetry_exporter_trace_service_pb.decode_msg(binary, :export_trace_service_request)
    extract_spans(request)
  end

  def parse_json(body) when is_map(body) do
    resource_spans = Map.get(body, "resourceSpans", [])

    Enum.flat_map(resource_spans, fn rs ->
      resource_attributes = extract_json_attributes(get_in(rs, ["resource", "attributes"]) || [])

      scope_spans = Map.get(rs, "scopeSpans", [])

      Enum.flat_map(scope_spans, fn ss ->
        spans = Map.get(ss, "spans", [])

        Enum.map(spans, fn span ->
          %{
            trace_id: Map.get(span, "traceId", ""),
            span_id: Map.get(span, "spanId", ""),
            parent_span_id: Map.get(span, "parentSpanId", ""),
            name: Map.get(span, "name", ""),
            start_time_unix_nano: parse_nano_string(Map.get(span, "startTimeUnixNano", "0")),
            end_time_unix_nano: parse_nano_string(Map.get(span, "endTimeUnixNano", "0")),
            status: extract_json_status(Map.get(span, "status", %{})),
            attributes: extract_json_attributes(Map.get(span, "attributes", [])),
            resource_attributes: resource_attributes
          }
        end)
      end)
    end)
  end

  defp extract_spans(request) do
    resource_spans = elem(request, 1)

    Enum.flat_map(resource_spans, fn rs ->
      resource = elem(rs, 1)
      resource_attributes = extract_pb_attributes(elem(resource, 1))

      scope_spans = elem(rs, 2)

      Enum.flat_map(scope_spans, fn ss ->
        spans = elem(ss, 2)

        Enum.map(spans, fn span ->
          %{
            trace_id: encode_hex(elem(span, 1)),
            span_id: encode_hex(elem(span, 2)),
            parent_span_id: encode_hex(elem(span, 4)),
            name: to_string(elem(span, 5)),
            start_time_unix_nano: elem(span, 7),
            end_time_unix_nano: elem(span, 8),
            status: extract_pb_status(elem(span, 14)),
            attributes: extract_pb_attributes(elem(span, 9)),
            resource_attributes: resource_attributes
          }
        end)
      end)
    end)
  end

  defp extract_pb_attributes(attrs) when is_list(attrs) do
    Map.new(attrs, fn kv ->
      key = to_string(elem(kv, 1))
      value = extract_pb_value(elem(kv, 2))
      {key, value}
    end)
  end

  defp extract_pb_attributes(_), do: %{}

  defp extract_pb_value(any_value) when is_tuple(any_value) do
    case elem(any_value, 0) do
      :any_value ->
        cond do
          elem(any_value, 1) != "" and is_binary(elem(any_value, 1)) ->
            elem(any_value, 1)

          elem(any_value, 3) != 0 ->
            elem(any_value, 3)

          elem(any_value, 4) != 0.0 ->
            elem(any_value, 4)

          elem(any_value, 2) != false ->
            elem(any_value, 2)

          true ->
            to_string(elem(any_value, 1))
        end

      _ ->
        ""
    end
  end

  defp extract_pb_value(_), do: ""

  defp extract_pb_status(status) when is_tuple(status) do
    case elem(status, 0) do
      :status ->
        code = elem(status, 2)

        case code do
          :STATUS_CODE_OK -> "ok"
          :STATUS_CODE_ERROR -> "error"
          _ -> "unset"
        end

      _ ->
        "unset"
    end
  end

  defp extract_pb_status(_), do: "unset"

  defp extract_json_status(%{"code" => code}) do
    case code do
      1 -> "ok"
      2 -> "error"
      _ -> "unset"
    end
  end

  defp extract_json_status(_), do: "unset"

  defp extract_json_attributes(attrs) when is_list(attrs) do
    Map.new(attrs, fn attr ->
      key = Map.get(attr, "key", "")
      value = extract_json_value(Map.get(attr, "value", %{}))
      {key, value}
    end)
  end

  defp extract_json_attributes(_), do: %{}

  defp extract_json_value(%{"stringValue" => v}), do: v
  defp extract_json_value(%{"intValue" => v}) when is_binary(v), do: String.to_integer(v)
  defp extract_json_value(%{"intValue" => v}), do: v
  defp extract_json_value(%{"doubleValue" => v}), do: v
  defp extract_json_value(%{"boolValue" => v}), do: v
  defp extract_json_value(_), do: ""

  defp encode_hex(bytes) when is_binary(bytes) and byte_size(bytes) > 0 do
    Base.encode16(bytes, case: :lower)
  end

  defp encode_hex(_), do: ""

  defp parse_nano_string(v) when is_binary(v) do
    case Integer.parse(v) do
      {n, _} -> n
      :error -> 0
    end
  end

  defp parse_nano_string(v) when is_integer(v), do: v
  defp parse_nano_string(_), do: 0

  defp get_in(map, []), do: map

  defp get_in(map, [key | rest]) when is_map(map) do
    get_in(Map.get(map, key), rest)
  end

  defp get_in(_, _), do: nil
end

defmodule Tuist.Gradle.LiveTraces do
  @moduledoc false
  use GenServer

  @table_name :gradle_live_traces
  @max_spans_per_build 10_000
  @cleanup_interval :timer.minutes(5)
  @max_age_ms :timer.minutes(30)

  def start_link(opts \\ []) do
    GenServer.start_link(__MODULE__, opts, name: __MODULE__)
  end

  def add_spans(build_id, project_id, spans) when is_list(spans) do
    GenServer.cast(__MODULE__, {:add_spans, build_id, project_id, spans})
  end

  def get_spans(build_id) do
    case :ets.lookup(@table_name, build_id) do
      [{^build_id, _project_id, spans, _inserted_at}] -> spans
      [] -> []
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def init(_opts) do
    :ets.new(@table_name, [:named_table, :set, :public, read_concurrency: true])
    schedule_cleanup()
    {:ok, %{}}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_cast({:add_spans, build_id, project_id, new_spans}, state) do
    existing_spans =
      case :ets.lookup(@table_name, build_id) do
        [{^build_id, _pid, spans, _ts}] -> spans
        [] -> []
      end

    combined = Enum.take(existing_spans ++ new_spans, @max_spans_per_build)
    :ets.insert(@table_name, {build_id, project_id, combined, System.monotonic_time(:millisecond)})

    Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast(
      Tuist.PubSub,
      "gradle_traces:#{project_id}:#{build_id}",
      {:gradle_trace_spans, build_id, new_spans}
    )

    {:noreply, state}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_info(:cleanup, state) do
    now = System.monotonic_time(:millisecond)

    :ets.foldl(
      fn {build_id, _project_id, _spans, inserted_at}, acc ->
        if now - inserted_at > @max_age_ms do
          :ets.delete(@table_name, build_id)
        end

        acc
      end,
      nil,
      @table_name
    )

    schedule_cleanup()
    {:noreply, state}
  end

  defp schedule_cleanup do

defmodule Tuist.Gradle.LiveTraces do
  @moduledoc false
  use GenServer

  @table_name :gradle_live_traces
  @max_spans_per_build 10_000
  @cleanup_interval :timer.minutes(5)
  @max_age_ms :timer.minutes(30)

  def start_link(opts \\ []) do
    GenServer.start_link(__MODULE__, opts, name: __MODULE__)
  end

  def add_spans(build_id, project_id, spans) when is_list(spans) do
    GenServer.cast(__MODULE__, {:add_spans, build_id, project_id, spans})
  end

  def get_spans(build_id) do
    case :ets.lookup(@table_name, build_id) do
      [{^build_id, _project_id, spans, _inserted_at}] -> spans
      [] -> []
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def init(_opts) do
    :ets.new(@table_name, [:named_table, :set, :public, read_concurrency: true])
    schedule_cleanup()
    {:ok, %{}}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_cast({:add_spans, build_id, project_id, new_spans}, state) do
    existing_spans =
      case :ets.lookup(@table_name, build_id) do
        [{^build_id, _pid, spans, _ts}] -> spans
        [] -> []
      end

    combined = Enum.take(existing_spans ++ new_spans, @max_spans_per_build)
    :ets.insert(@table_name, {build_id, project_id, combined, System.monotonic_time(:millisecond)})

    Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast(
      Tuist.PubSub,
      "gradle_traces:#{project_id}:#{build_id}",
      {:gradle_trace_spans, build_id, new_spans}
    )

    {:noreply, state}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_info(:cleanup, state) do
    now = System.monotonic_time(:millisecond)

    :ets.foldl(
      fn {build_id, _project_id, _spans, inserted_at}, acc ->
        if now - inserted_at > @max_age_ms do
          :ets.delete(@table_name, build_id)
        end

        acc
      end,
      nil,
      @table_name
    )

    schedule_cleanup()
    {:noreply, state}
  end

  defp schedule_cleanup do
    Process.send_after(self(), :cleanup, @cleanup_interval)
  end
end

defmodule Tuist.Gradle.Waterfall do
  @moduledoc false

  def build(spans) when is_list(spans) and length(spans) == 0, do: nil

  def build(spans) do
    root_start = find_root_start(spans)
    now_ns = System.os_time(:nanosecond)

    sorted_spans =
      spans
      |> Enum.sort_by(& &1.start_time_unix_nano)

    categories = Enum.map(sorted_spans, & &1.name)

    spacer_data =
      Enum.map(sorted_spans, fn span ->
        offset_ms = div(span.start_time_unix_nano - root_start, 1_000_000)
        max(offset_ms, 0)
      end)

    duration_data =
      Enum.map(sorted_spans, fn span ->
        end_time =
          if span.end_time_unix_nano == 0,
            do: now_ns,
            else: span.end_time_unix_nano

        duration_ms = div(end_time - span.start_time_unix_nano, 1_000_000)
        max(duration_ms, 1)
      end)

    colors =
      Enum.map(sorted_spans, fn span ->
        cond do
          span.end_time_unix_nano == 0 -> "var:noora-chart-primary"
          span.status == "error" -> "var:noora-chart-destructive"
          true -> "var:noora-chart-secondary"
        end
      end)

    max_time_ms =
      Enum.zip(spacer_data, duration_data)
      |> Enum.map(fn {spacer, dur} -> spacer + dur end)
      |> Enum.max(fn -> 0 end)

    %{
      categories: categories,
      series: [
        %{
          name: "offset",
          type: "bar",
          stack: "total",
          data: spacer_data,
          itemStyle: %{color: "transparent"},
          emphasis: %{itemStyle: %{color: "transparent"}},
          tooltip: %{show: false}
        },
        %{
          name: "duration",
          type: "bar",
          stack: "total",
          data:
            Enum.zip([duration_data, colors])
            |> Enum.map(fn {value, color} ->
              %{value: value, itemStyle: %{color: color, borderRadius: [0, 4, 4, 0]}}
            end)
        }
      ],
      max_time_ms: max_time_ms
    }
  end

  defp find_root_start(spans) do
    spans
    |> Enum.filter(fn span -> span.parent_span_id == "" or is_nil(span.parent_span_id) end)
    |> case do
      [root | _] -> root.start_time_unix_nano
      [] -> Enum.min_by(spans, & &1.start_time_unix_nano) |> Map.get(:start_time_unix_nano)
    end
  end
end

defmodule TuistWeb.API.GradleTracesController do
  use TuistWeb, :controller

  alias Tuist.Gradle.LiveTraces
  alias Tuist.Gradle.OTLPParser

  plug(TuistWeb.Plugs.LoaderPlug)
  plug(TuistWeb.API.Authorization.AuthorizationPlug, :build)

  def receive_traces(conn, _params) do
    %{selected_project: project} = conn.assigns

    content_type =
      conn
      |> get_req_header("content-type")
      |> List.first("")

    {:ok, body, conn} = Plug.Conn.read_body(conn)

    spans =
      cond do
        String.contains?(content_type, "application/x-protobuf") ->
          OTLPParser.parse_protobuf(body)

        String.contains?(content_type, "application/json") ->
          case Jason.decode(body) do
            {:ok, decoded} -> OTLPParser.parse_json(decoded)
            {:error, _} -> []
          end

        true ->
          OTLPParser.parse_protobuf(body)
      end

    build_id = extract_build_id(spans)

    if build_id && spans != [] do
      LiveTraces.add_spans(build_id, project.id, spans)
    end

    conn
    |> put_status(200)
    |> json(%{})
  end

  defp extract_build_id([span | _]) do
    Map.get(span.resource_attributes, "tuist.build.id") ||
      Map.get(span.attributes, "tuist.build.id")
  end

  defp extract_build_id(_), do: nil
end

defmodule TuistWeb.Router do
  use TuistWeb, :router

  import Oban.Web.Router
  import Phoenix.LiveDashboard.Router
  import Redirect
  import TuistWeb.Authentication
  import TuistWeb.Authorization
  import TuistWeb.RateLimit.InMemory

  alias TuistWeb.Marketing.Localization
  alias TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingController
  alias TuistWeb.Plugs.SentryContextPlug
  alias TuistWeb.Plugs.UeberauthHostPlug

  pipeline :open_api do
    plug OpenApiSpex.Plug.PutApiSpec, module: TuistWeb.API.Spec
  end

  pipeline :content_security_policy do
    plug :put_content_security_policy,
      frame_ancestors: "'self'",
      img_src:
        "'self' data: https://github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com https://*.gravatar.com https://*.s3.amazonaws.com",
      media_src:
        "'self' https://*.mastodon.social https://hachyderm.io https://fosstodon.org http://localhost:9095 https://t3.storage.dev",
      style_src:
        "'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://rsms.me",
      style_src_attr: "'unsafe-inline'",
      style_src_elem:
        "'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://rsms.me https://marketing.tuist.dev",
      # wasm-unsafe-eval is necssary for the Shiki code highlighting
      script_src: "'self' 'nonce' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'",
      script_src_elem:
        "'self' 'nonce' https://d3js.org https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://esm.sh https://chat.cdn-plain.com https://*.posthog.com https://marketing.tuist.dev",
      font_src:
        "'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com data: https://fonts.scalar.com https://rsms.me",
      frame_src: "'self' https://chat.cdn-plain.com https://*.tuist.dev https://newassets.hcaptcha.com",
      connect_src: "'self' https://chat.cdn-plain.com  https://chat.uk.plain.com https://*.posthog.com"
  end

  pipeline :browser_app do
    plug :accepts, ["html"]
    plug :disable_robot_indexing
    plug :fetch_session
    plug TuistWeb.Plugs.TimezonePlug
    plug :fetch_live_flash
    plug :put_root_layout, html: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :app}
    plug :protect_from_forgery
    plug :put_secure_browser_headers
    plug UeberauthHostPlug
    plug :fetch_current_user
    plug SentryContextPlug
    plug :content_security_policy
  end

  pipeline :browser_app_image do
    plug :accepts, ["svg", "png"]
    plug :disable_robot_indexing
    plug :fetch_session
    plug :fetch_live_flash
    plug :protect_from_forgery
    plug :put_secure_browser_headers
    plug :fetch_current_user
    plug SentryContextPlug
    plug :content_security_policy
  end

  pipeline :ueberauth do
    plug :accepts, ["html"]
    plug :disable_robot_indexing
    plug :fetch_session
    plug :fetch_live_flash
    plug :protect_from_forgery
    plug :put_secure_browser_headers
    plug UeberauthHostPlug
    plug Ueberauth
  end

  # Some endpoints must be accessible without the :protect_from_forgery plug.
  # For example, the POST request Apple makes as part of OAuth 2.0 is not compatible with the CSRF protection.
  pipeline :unprotected_browser_app do
    plug :accepts, ["html"]
    plug :disable_robot_indexing
    plug :fetch_session
    plug :fetch_live_flash
    plug :put_root_layout, html: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :app}
    plug :put_secure_browser_headers
    plug UeberauthHostPlug
    plug Ueberauth
    plug :fetch_current_user
    plug SentryContextPlug
    plug :content_security_policy
  end

  pipeline :browser_marketing do
    plug :accepts, ["html"]
    plug :enable_robot_indexing
    plug TuistWeb.Plugs.LegacyRedirectsPlug
    plug :fetch_session
    plug :fetch_live_flash
    plug :put_root_layout, html: {TuistWeb.Marketing.Layouts, :root}
    plug :protect_from_forgery
    plug :put_secure_browser_headers
    plug UeberauthHostPlug
    plug Ueberauth
    plug :fetch_current_user
    plug SentryContextPlug
    plug :assign_current_path
    plug :content_security_policy
    plug TuistWeb.OnPremisePlug, :forward_marketing_to_dashboard
    plug Localization, :redirect_to_localized_route
    plug Localization, :put_locale
  end

  pipeline :browser_marketing_feed do
    plug :accepts, ["xml"]
    plug TuistWeb.OnPremisePlug, :forward_marketing_to_dashboard
  end

  pipeline :non_authenticated_api do
    plug :accepts, ["json"]

    plug TuistWeb.WarningsHeaderPlug
  end

  pipeline :api_registry_swift do
    plug :accepts, ["swift-registry-v1-json", "swift-registry-v1-zip", "swift-registry-v1-api"]
    plug TuistWeb.AuthenticationPlug, :load_authenticated_subject
    plug SentryContextPlug
    plug TuistWeb.RateLimit.Registry
  end

  pipeline :authenticated_api do
    plug :accepts, ["json", "application/octet-stream"]

    plug TuistWeb.WarningsHeaderPlug
    plug TuistWeb.AuthenticationPlug, :load_authenticated_subject
    plug TuistWeb.AuthenticationPlug, {:require_authentication, response_type: :open_api}
    plug SentryContextPlug
  end

  pipeline :authenticated do
    plug TuistWeb.AuthenticationPlug, :load_authenticated_subject
    plug SentryContextPlug
  end

  pipeline :on_premise_api do
    plug TuistWeb.OnPremisePlug, :api_license_validation
  end

  pipeline :analytics do
    plug TuistWeb.AnalyticsPlug, :track_page_view
  end

  # Marketing

  scope "/" do
    pipe_through [:browser_marketing_feed]

    redirect("/rss.xml", "/blog/rss.xml", :permanent, preserve_query_string: true)
    redirect("/case-studies", "/customers", :permanent, preserve_query_string: true)
    redirect("/case-studies/:slug", "/customers/:slug", :permanent, preserve_query_string: true)

    get "/blog/rss.xml", MarketingController, :blog_rss, metadata: %{type: :marketing}

    get "/blog/atom.xml", MarketingController, :blog_atom, metadata: %{type: :marketing}

    get "/changelog/rss.xml", MarketingController, :changelog_rss, metadata: %{type: :marketing}

    get "/changelog/atom.xml", MarketingController, :changelog_atom, metadata: %{type: :marketing}

    get "/sitemap.xml", MarketingController, :sitemap, metadata: %{type: :marketing}
  end

  scope "/" do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_marketing,
      :assign_current_path
    ]

    for locale <- ["en"] ++ Localization.additional_locales() do
      locale_path_prefix = Localization.locale_path_prefix(locale)

      private = %{locale: locale}

      live_session String.to_atom("marketing_#{locale}"),
        on_mount: Localization do
        live Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/blog"), TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingBlogLive,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

        live Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/changelog"),
             TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingChangelogLive,
             metadata: %{type: :marketing},
             private: private

        live Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/customers"),
             TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingCustomersLive,
             metadata: %{type: :marketing},
             private: private

        live Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/qa"),
             TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingQALive,
             metadata: %{type: :marketing},
             private: private
      end

      get locale_path_prefix, MarketingController, :home,
        metadata: %{type: :marketing},
        private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/pricing"),
          MarketingController,
          :pricing,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/blog/:year/:month/:day/:slug/iframe.html"),
          TuistWeb.Marketing.MarketingBlogIframeController,
          :show,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/blog/:year/:month/:day/:slug"),
          MarketingController,
          :blog_post,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/customers/:slug"),
          MarketingController,
          :case_study,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      for %{slug: page_slug} <- Tuist.Marketing.Pages.get_pages() do
        get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, page_slug),
            MarketingController,
            :page,
            metadata: %{type: :marketing},
            private: private
      end

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/about"), MarketingController, :about,
        metadata: %{type: :marketing},
        private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/support"), MarketingController, :support,
        metadata: %{type: :marketing},
        private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/newsletter"),
          MarketingController,
          :newsletter,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      post Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/newsletter"),
           MarketingController,
           :newsletter_signup,
           metadata: %{type: :marketing},
           private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/newsletter/verify"),
          MarketingController,
          :newsletter_verify,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private

      get Path.join(locale_path_prefix, "/newsletter/issues/:issue_number"),
          MarketingController,
          :newsletter_issue,
          metadata: %{type: :marketing},
          private: private
    end
  end

  scope "/", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :browser_app]

    get "/ready", PageController, :ready
    get "/api/docs", APIController, :docs
  end

  scope "/integrations", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :browser_app]

    get "/github/setup", GitHubAppSetupController, :setup
    get "/slack/callback", SlackOAuthController, :callback
  end

  scope "/.well-known", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :non_authenticated_api]

    get "/openid-configuration", WellKnownController, :openid_configuration
    get "/jwks.json", WellKnownController, :jwks
    get "/apple-app-site-association", WellKnownController, :apple_app_site_association
  end

  scope path: "/api",
        alias: TuistWeb.API,
        assigns: %{caching: not Tuist.Environment.test?(), cache_ttl: to_timeout(minute: 1)} do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :authenticated_api, :on_premise_api]

    scope "/accounts/:account_handle" do
      patch "/", AccountController, :update_account
      delete "/", AccountController, :delete_account

      scope "/tokens" do
        post "/", AccountTokensController, :create
        get "/", AccountTokensController, :index
        delete "/:token_name", AccountTokensController, :delete
      end
    end

    post "/analytics", AnalyticsController, :create
    post "/runs/:run_id/start", AnalyticsController, :multipart_start

    post "/runs/:run_id/generate-url",
         AnalyticsController,
         :multipart_generate_url

    post "/runs/:run_id/complete",
         AnalyticsController,
         :multipart_complete

    put "/runs/:run_id/complete_artifacts_uploads",
        AnalyticsController,
        :complete_artifacts_uploads

    scope "/projects" do
      post "/", ProjectsController, :create
      get "/", ProjectsController, :index
      delete "/:id", ProjectsController, :delete

      scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle" do
        get "/", ProjectsController, :show
        put "/", ProjectsController, :update

        scope "/bundles" do
          get "/", BundlesController, :index
          get "/:bundle_id", BundlesController, :show
          post "/", BundlesController, :create
        end

        scope "/runs" do
          get "/", RunsController, :index
          post "/", RunsController, :create
          post "/:run_id/start", AnalyticsController, :multipart_start_project
          post "/:run_id/generate-url", AnalyticsController, :multipart_generate_url_project
          post "/:run_id/complete", AnalyticsController, :multipart_complete_project

          put "/:run_id/complete_artifacts_uploads",
              AnalyticsController,
              :complete_artifacts_uploads_project
        end

        scope "/generations" do
          get "/", GenerationsController, :index
          get "/:generation_id", GenerationsController, :show
        end

        scope "/cache-runs" do
          get "/", CacheRunsController, :index
          get "/:cache_run_id", CacheRunsController, :show
        end

        scope "/tests" do
          scope "/test-cases" do
            get "/", TestCasesController, :index

            scope "/runs" do
              get "/", TestCaseRunsController, :index
              get "/:test_case_run_id", TestCaseRunsController, :show
            end

            get "/:test_case_id", TestCasesController, :show
            get "/:test_case_id/runs", TestCaseRunsController, :index_by_test_case
          end

          get "/:test_run_id", TestsController, :show
          get "/:test_run_id/test-case-runs", TestCaseRunsController, :index_by_test_run
          post "/", TestsController, :create
          post "/crash-reports", CrashReportsController, :create
          post "/attachments", TestCaseRunAttachmentsController, :create
        end

        scope "/builds" do
          get "/", BuildsController, :index
          get "/:build_id", BuildsController, :show
          post "/", BuildsController, :create
        end

        scope "/gradle" do
          post "/builds", GradleController, :create_build
          get "/builds", GradleController, :list_builds
          get "/builds/:build_id", GradleController, :get_build
        end

        scope "/previews" do
          post "/start", PreviewsController, :multipart_start
          post "/generate-url", PreviewsController, :multipart_generate_url
          post "/complete", PreviewsController, :multipart_complete
          post "/:preview_id/icons", PreviewsController, :upload_icon
          get "/latest", PreviewsController, :latest
          get "/:preview_id", PreviewsController, :show
          get "/", PreviewsController, :index
          delete "/:preview_id", PreviewsController, :delete
        end

        scope "/qa" do
          post "/runs/:qa_run_id/steps", QAController, :create_step
          patch "/runs/:qa_run_id/steps/:step_id", QAController, :update_step
          patch "/runs/:qa_run_id", QAController, :update_run

          post "/runs/:qa_run_id/screenshots", QAController, :create_screenshot

          post "/runs/:qa_run_id/recordings/upload/start", QAController, :start_recording_upload

          post "/runs/:qa_run_id/recordings/upload/generate-url",
               QAController,
               :generate_recording_upload_url

          post "/runs/:qa_run_id/recordings/upload/complete",
               QAController,
               :complete_recording_upload
        end

        scope "/tokens" do
          post "/", ProjectTokensController, :create
          get "/", ProjectTokensController, :index
          delete "/:id", ProjectTokensController, :delete
        end

        scope "/cache" do
          put "/clean", CacheController, :clean

          scope "/ac" do
            post "/", CacheController, :upload_cache_action_item
            get "/:hash", CacheController, :get_cache_action_item
          end
        end
      end
    end

    scope "/cache" do
      get "/endpoints", CacheController, :endpoints
      get "/", CacheController, :download
      get "/exists", CacheController, :exists

      scope "/multipart" do
        post "/start", CacheController, :multipart_start
        post "/generate-url", CacheController, :multipart_generate_url
        post "/complete", CacheController, :multipart_complete
      end
    end

    resources "/organizations", OrganizationsController,
      param: "organization_name",
      only: [:index, :create, :delete, :show, :update]

    get "/organizations/:organization_name/usage", OrganizationsController, :usage

    resources "/organizations/:organization_name/invitations", InvitationsController, only: [:create]

    delete "/organizations/:organization_name/invitations", InvitationsController, :delete

    delete "/organizations/:organization_name/members/:user_name",
           OrganizationsController,
           :remove_member

    put "/organizations/:organization_name/members/:user_name",
        OrganizationsController,
        :update_member
  end

  scope "/api", TuistWeb.API do
    # Deprecated Swift package registry endpoints
    scope "/accounts/:account_handle/registry", Registry do
      scope "/swift" do
        pipe_through [:api_registry_swift]

        get "/identifiers", SwiftController, :identifiers
        get "/:scope/:name", SwiftController, :list_releases
        get "/:scope/:name/:version", SwiftController, :show_release
        get "/:scope/:name/:version/Package.swift", SwiftController, :show_package_swift
        get "/availability", SwiftController, :availability
        post "/login", SwiftController, :login
      end
    end

    # Swift package registry endpoints
    scope "/registry/swift", Registry do
      pipe_through [:api_registry_swift]

      get "/identifiers", SwiftController, :identifiers
      get "/:scope/:name", SwiftController, :list_releases
      get "/:scope/:name/:version", SwiftController, :show_release
      get "/:scope/:name/:version/Package.swift", SwiftController, :show_package_swift
      get "/availability", SwiftController, :availability
      post "/login", SwiftController, :login
    end
  end

  scope "/api" do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :non_authenticated_api]

    get "/spec", OpenApiSpex.Plug.RenderSpec, []
  end

  scope "/api", TuistWeb.API do
    pipe_through [:open_api, :non_authenticated_api]

    get "/auth/device_code/:device_code", AuthController, :device_code
    post "/auth/refresh_token", AuthController, :refresh_token

    post "/auth", AuthController, :authenticate
    post "/auth/apple", AuthController, :authenticate_apple

    get "/registry/swift", Registry.SwiftController, :availability

    post "/auth/oidc/token", OIDCController, :exchange_token
  end

  scope "/oauth2", TuistWeb.Oauth do
    pipe_through [:browser_app, :fetch_current_user]

    get "/authorize", AuthorizeController, :authorize
    get "/github", AuthorizeController, :authorize_with_github
    get "/google", AuthorizeController, :authorize_with_google
  end

  scope "/oauth2", TuistWeb.Oauth do
    pipe_through :non_authenticated_api

    post "/token", TokenController, :token
  end

  # Ops Routes
  pipeline :ops do
    plug TuistWeb.Authorization, [:current_user, :read, :ops]
    plug :assign_current_path
  end

  scope "/ops" do
    pipe_through [:browser_app, :ops]

    oban_dashboard("/oban", csp_nonce_assign_key: :csp_nonce)

    forward "/flags", FunWithFlags.UI.Router, namespace: "ops/flags"

    live_dashboard "/dashboard",
      metrics: TuistWeb.Telemetry,
      ecto_repos: [Tuist.Repo],
      ecto_psql_extras_options: [long_running_queries: [threshold: "200 milliseconds"]],
      on_mount: [
        {TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated},
        {TuistWeb.Authorization, [:current_user, :read, :ops]}
      ],
      additional_pages: [
        route_name: TuistWeb.OpsConfigurationLive,
        broadway: {BroadwayDashboard, pipelines: [Tuist.API.Pipeline]}
      ],
      csp_nonce_assign_key: %{
        style: :csp_nonce,
        script: :csp_nonce
      }

    live_session :ops_qa,
      layout: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :ops},
      on_mount: [
        {TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated},
        {TuistWeb.Authorization, [:current_user, :read, :ops]},
        {TuistWeb.LayoutLive, :ops}
      ] do
      live "/qa", TuistWeb.OpsQALive
      live "/qa/:qa_run_id/logs", TuistWeb.OpsQALogsLive
    end

    live_session :ops_cache,
      layout: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :ops},
      on_mount: [
        {TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated},
        {TuistWeb.Authorization, [:current_user, :read, :ops]},
        {TuistWeb.LayoutLive, :ops}
      ] do
      live "/cache", TuistWeb.OpsCacheLive
    end
  end

  if Tuist.Environment.dev?() do
    scope "/ops" do
      pipe_through [:browser_app]

      forward "/sent_emails", Bamboo.SentEmailViewerPlug
    end
  end

  ## Authentication routes

  scope "/", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:browser_app, :redirect_if_user_is_authenticated]

    live_session :redirect_if_user_is_authenticated,
      on_mount: [{TuistWeb.Authentication, :redirect_if_user_is_authenticated}] do
      live "/users/register", UserRegistrationLive, :new
      live "/users/log_in", UserLoginLive, :new
      live "/users/log_in/okta", UserOktaLoginLive, :new
      live "/users/log_in/sso", SSOLoginLive, :new
      live "/users/reset_password", UserForgotPasswordLive, :new
      live "/users/reset_password/:token", UserResetPasswordLive, :edit
      live "/users/choose-username", ChooseUsernameLive, :new
    end

    post "/users/log_in", UserSessionController, :create
  end

  scope "/", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:browser_app, :require_authenticated_user, :analytics]

    live_session :require_authenticated_user,
      on_mount: [{TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated}] do
      get "/dashboard", DashboardController, :dashboard
      live "/organizations/new", CreateOrganizationLive, :new
      live "/projects/new", CreateProjectLive, :new
    end
  end

  scope "/", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:browser_app]

    delete "/users/log_out", UserSessionController, :delete

    live_session :current_user,
      on_mount: [{TuistWeb.Authentication, :mount_current_user}] do
      live "/users/confirm/:token", UserConfirmationLive, :edit
    end
  end

  scope "/auth", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:browser_app]
    get "/complete-signup", AuthController, :complete_signup
  end

  scope "/users/auth", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through :browser_app
    get "/okta", AuthController, :okta_request
    get "/okta/callback", AuthController, :okta_callback
  end

  scope "/users/auth", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through :ueberauth
    get "/:provider", AuthController, :request
    get "/:provider/callback", AuthController, :callback
  end

  scope "/users/auth", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through :unprotected_browser_app
    post "/:provider/callback", AuthController, :callback
  end

  scope "/auth", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [:browser_app, :require_authenticated_user]

    live_session :auth,
      on_mount: [{TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated}] do
      live "/device_codes/:device_code/success", DeviceCodesSuccessLive, :new
      live "/invitations/:token", AcceptInvitationLive, :new
    end

    # This route is deprecated and will be removed in future versions.
    get "/cli/:device_code", AuthController, :authenticate_cli_deprecated
    get "/device_codes/:device_code", AuthController, :authenticate_device_code
  end

  # Dashboard

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/previews", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/latest", PreviewController, :latest
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/previews", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app_image,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/latest/badge.svg", PreviewController, :latest_badge
    get "/:id/icon.png", PreviewController, :download_icon
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/qa/runs/:qa_run_id/screenshots", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app_image,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/:screenshot_id", QAController, :download_screenshot
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/previews/:id", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/manifest.plist", PreviewController, :manifest
    get "/app.ipa", PreviewController, :download_archive
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/previews/:id", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app_image,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/qr-code.svg", PreviewController, :download_qr_code_svg
    get "/qr-code.png", PreviewController, :download_qr_code_png
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle/previews/:id", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app,
      :require_authenticated_user_for_previews,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/download", PreviewController, :download_preview

    live_session :preview_detail,
      layout: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :project},
      on_mount: [
        {TuistWeb.Authentication, :mount_current_user},
        {TuistWeb.LayoutLive, :optional_project}
      ] do
      live "/", PreviewLive
    end
  end

  get "/download", TuistWeb.DownloadController, :download

  scope "/:account_handle", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app,
      :require_authenticated_user,
      :analytics
    ]

    get "/billing/manage", BillingController, :manage
    get "/billing/upgrade", BillingController, :upgrade

    live_session :account,
      layout: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :account},
      on_mount: [{TuistWeb.Authentication, :ensure_authenticated}, {TuistWeb.LayoutLive, :account}] do
      live "/", ProjectsLive
      live "/projects", ProjectsLive
      live "/members", MembersLive
      live "/billing", BillingLive
      live "/integrations", IntegrationsLive
      live "/settings", AccountSettingsLive
    end
  end

  scope "/:account_handle/:project_handle", TuistWeb do
    pipe_through [
      :open_api,
      :browser_app,
      :rate_limit,
      :require_authenticated_user_for_private_projects,
      :analytics,
      :require_user_can_read_project
    ]

    live_session :project,
      layout: {TuistWeb.Layouts, :project},
      on_mount: [
        {TuistWeb.LayoutLive, :project},
        {TuistWeb.Authentication, :mount_current_user}
      ] do
      live "/tests", TestsLive
      live "/tests/test-runs", TestRunsLive
      live "/tests/test-runs/:test_run_id", TestRunLive
      live "/tests/test-cases", TestCasesLive
      live "/tests/test-cases/:test_case_id", TestCaseLive
      live "/tests/flaky-tests", FlakyTestsLive
      live "/tests/quarantined-tests", QuarantinedTestsLive
      live "/module-cache", ModuleCacheLive
      live "/module-cache/cache-runs", CacheRunsLive
      live "/module-cache/generate-runs", GenerateRunsLive
      live "/xcode-cache", XcodeCacheLive
      live "/gradle-cache", GradleCacheLive
      live "/connect", ConnectLive
      live "/", OverviewLive
      live "/analytics", OverviewLive
      live "/bundles", BundlesLive
      live "/bundles/:bundle_id", BundleLive
      live "/builds", BuildsLive
      live "/builds/build-runs", BuildRunsLive
      live "/builds/build-runs/:build_run_id", BuildRunLive
      live "/previews", PreviewsLive
      live "/qa", QALive
      live "/qa/:qa_run_id", QARunLive, :overview
      live "/qa/:qa_run_id/logs", QARunLive, :logs
      live "/runs/:run_id", RunDetailLive
      get "/runs/:run_id/download", RunsController, :download

      get "/tests/test-cases/runs/:test_case_run_id/attachments/:file_name",
          TestCaseRunAttachmentsController,
          :download

      live "/settings", ProjectSettingsLive
      live "/settings/automations", ProjectAutomationsLive
      live "/settings/notifications", ProjectNotificationsLive
      live "/settings/qa", QASettingsLive
    end

    # Redirects for renamed routes
    get "/binary-cache/cache-runs", RedirectPlug, to: "/module-cache/cache-runs"
    get "/binary-cache/generate-runs", RedirectPlug, to: "/module-cache/generate-runs"
  end

  def assign_current_path(conn, _params) do
    assign(conn, :current_path, conn.request_path)
  end

  def disable_robot_indexing(conn, _params) do
    put_resp_header(conn, "x-robots-tag", "noindex, nofollow")
  end

  defp enable_robot_indexing(conn, params) do
    if Tuist.Environment.prod?() and Tuist.Environment.tuist_hosted?() do
      # Once we iterate on the open-graph tags of the dashboard pages for public projects
      # we should iterate on this to enable indexing for public projects
      put_resp_header(conn, "x-robots-tag", "index, follow")
    else
      disable_robot_indexing(conn, params)
    end
  end
end

toolUseResult.originalFile:
defmodule Tuist.Application do
  @moduledoc false

  use Application
  use Boundary, top_level?: true, deps: [Tuist, TuistWeb]

  alias Tuist.Builds.Build
  alias Tuist.CommandEvents
  alias Tuist.DBConnection.TelemetryListener
  alias Tuist.Environment
  alias Tuist.Gradle
  alias Tuist.Gradle.Build.Buffer
  alias Tuist.QA.Logs
  alias Tuist.Xcode.XcodeGraph
  alias Tuist.Xcode.XcodeProject
  alias Tuist.Xcode.XcodeTarget

  require Logger

  @impl true
  def start(_type, _args) do
    Logger.info("Starting Tuist version #{Environment.version()}")

    load_secrets_in_application()
    start_posthog()
    start_telemetry()
    start_sentry_logger()
    start_loki_logger()

    application =
      Supervisor.start_link(get_children(), strategy: :one_for_one, name: Tuist.Supervisor)

    Logger.info("Tuist application started")

    Tuist.License.assert_valid!()

    application
  end

  defp load_secrets_in_application do
    Environment.put_application_secrets(Environment.decrypt_secrets())
  end

  defp start_posthog do
    if Environment.analytics_enabled?() do
      case Application.start(:posthog) do
        :ok ->
          Logger.info("PostHog analytics started")

        {:error, {:already_started, _}} ->
          Logger.info("PostHog analytics already started")

        {:error, reason} ->
          Logger.warning("Failed to start PostHog analytics: #{inspect(reason)}")
      end
    end
  end

  defp start_telemetry do
    Oban.Telemetry.attach_default_logger()
    ReqTelemetry.attach_default_logger(:pipeline)

    if Application.get_env(:opentelemetry, :traces_exporter) != :none do
      OpentelemetryLoggerMetadata.setup()
      OpentelemetryBandit.setup()
      OpentelemetryPhoenix.setup(adapter: :bandit)
      OpentelemetryEcto.setup(event_prefix: [:tuist, :repo])
      OpentelemetryFinch.setup()
      OpentelemetryBroadway.setup()
    end
  end

  defp start_sentry_logger do
    if Environment.error_tracking_enabled?() do
      :logger.add_handler(:sentry_handler, Sentry.LoggerHandler, %{
        config: %{metadata: [:file, :line]}
      })
    end
  end

  defp start_loki_logger do
    loki_url = Environment.loki_url()

    if loki_url do
      LokiLoggerHandler.attach(:loki_handler,
        loki_url: loki_url,
        storage: :memory,
        labels: %{
          app: {:static, "tuist-server"},
          service_name: {:static, "tuist-server"},
          service_namespace: {:static, "tuist"},
          env: {:static, to_string(Environment.env())},
          level: :level
        },
        structured_metadata: [:trace_id, :span_id, :request_id]
      )
    end
  end

  defp get_children do
    children =
      [
        {DBConnection.TelemetryListener, name: TelemetryListener},
        {Tuist.Repo, connection_listeners: [TelemetryListener]},
        Tuist.ClickHouseRepo,
        Tuist.IngestRepo,
        Supervisor.child_spec(CommandEvents.Buffer, id: CommandEvents.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(Build.Buffer, id: Build.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(Logs.Buffer, id: Logs.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(XcodeGraph.Buffer, id: XcodeGraph.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(XcodeProject.Buffer, id: XcodeProject.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(XcodeTarget.Buffer, id: XcodeTarget.Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(Buffer, id: Buffer),
        Supervisor.child_spec(Gradle.Task.Buffer, id: Gradle.Task.Buffer),
        Tuist.Vault,
        {Oban, Application.fetch_env!(:tuist, Oban)},
        {Cachex, [:tuist, []]},
        {Finch, name: Tuist.Finch, pools: finch_pools()},
        {Phoenix.PubSub, name: Tuist.PubSub},
        {TuistWeb.RateLimit.InMemory, [clean_period: to_timeout(hour: 1)]},
        {Tuist.API.Pipeline, []},
        {Guardian.DB.Sweeper, [interval: 60 * 60 * 1000]},
        TuistWeb.Telemetry,
        TuistWeb.Endpoint
      ]

    children
    |> Kernel.++(
      if Environment.dev_use_remote_storage?() do
        []
      else
        %{port: minio_port, scheme: minio_scheme} = URI.parse(Environment.s3_endpoint())
        port = minio_port || 9095
        console_port = Environment.minio_console_port()

        {minio_path, 0} = System.cmd("mise", ["which", "minio"])

        minio_path = String.trim(minio_path)

        [
          {MinioServer,
           name: :minio_dev,
           port: port,
           scheme: minio_scheme,
           region: Environment.s3_region(),
           access_key_id: Environment.s3_access_key_id(),
           secret_access_key: Environment.s3_secret_access_key(),
           minio_executable: minio_path,
           console_address: ":#{console_port}"},
          Tuist.MinioBucketCreator
        ]
      end
    )
    |> Kernel.++(
      if Environment.tuist_hosted?() do
        topologies = Application.get_env(:libcluster, :topologies) || []
        [{Cluster.Supervisor, [topologies, [name: Tuist.ClusterSupervisor]]}]
      else
        []
      end
    )
    |> Kernel.++(
      if Environment.redis_url(),
        do: [
          {Redix, redis_opts()},
          {TuistWeb.RateLimit.PersistentTokenBucket, redis_opts()}
        ],
        else: []
    )
  end

  defp s3_ca_cert_opts do
    case Environment.s3_ca_cert_pem() do
      nil ->
        [cacertfile: CAStore.file_path()]

      pem_content ->
        der_certs =
          pem_content
          |> :public_key.pem_decode()
          |> Enum.map(fn {_, der, _} -> der end)

        [cacerts: der_certs]
    end
  end

  defp finch_pools do
    if Environment.test?() do
      %{:default => [size: 10]}
    else
      base_pools =
        %{
          :default => [size: 10, start_pool_metrics?: true],
          "https://api.github.com" => [
            conn_opts: [
              log: true,
              protocols: [:http2, :http1],
              transport_opts: [
                inet6: Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
                cacertfile: CAStore.file_path(),
                verify: :verify_peer
              ]
            ],
            size: 10,
            count: 2,
            protocols: [:http2, :http1],
            start_pool_metrics?: true
          ],
          Environment.s3_endpoint() => [
            conn_opts: [
              log: true,
              protocols: Environment.s3_protocols(),
              transport_opts:
                [
                  inet6: Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
                  verify: :verify_peer
                ] ++ s3_ca_cert_opts()
            ],
            size: Environment.s3_pool_size(),
            count: Environment.s3_pool_count(),
            protocols: Environment.s3_protocols(),
            start_pool_metrics?: true
          ],
          "https://marketing.tuist.dev" => [
            conn_opts: [
              log: true,
              protocols: [:http2, :http1],
              transport_opts: [
                inet6: Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
                cacertfile: CAStore.file_path(),
                verify: :verify_peer
              ]
            ],
            size: 10,
            count: 1,
            protocols: [:http2, :http1],
            start_pool_metrics?: true
          ],
          Environment.posthog_url() => [
            conn_opts: [
              log: true,
              protocols: [:http2, :http1],
              transport_opts: [
                inet6: Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
                cacertfile: CAStore.file_path(),
                verify: :verify_peer
              ]
            ],
            size: 5,
            count: 1,
            protocols: [:http2, :http1],
            start_pool_metrics?: true
          ]
        }
        |> Enum.reject(fn {key, _value} -> is_nil(key) end)
        |> Map.new()

      additional_pools =
        Map.new(Environment.additional_finch_pools(), fn {endpoint, config} ->
          {endpoint, build_additional_pool_opts(config)}
        end)

      Map.merge(base_pools, additional_pools)
    end
  end

  defp build_additional_pool_opts(config) when is_map(config) do
    size = Map.get(config, "size", 100)
    count = Map.get(config, "count", System.schedulers_online())

    [
      conn_opts: [
        log: true,
        protocols: [:http1],
        transport_opts: [
          inet6: Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
          cacertfile: CAStore.file_path(),
          verify: :verify_peer
        ]
      ],
      size: size,
      count: count,
      protocols: [:http1],
      start_pool_metrics?: true
    ]
  end

  # Tell Phoenix to update the endpoint configuration
  # whenever the application is updated.
  @impl true
  def config_change(changed, _new, removed) do
    TuistWeb.Endpoint.config_change(changed, removed)
    :ok
  end

  def redis_opts do
    %URI{} = parsed_url = URI.parse(Environment.redis_url())

    socket_opts =
      if Environment.use_ipv6?() in ~w(true 1),
        do: [:inet6, {:keepalive, true}],
        else: [{:keepalive, true}]

    opts = [
      name: Environment.redis_conn_name(),
      host: parsed_url.host,
      port: parsed_url.port,
      sync_connect: false,
      socket_opts: socket_opts
    ]

    case parsed_url.userinfo do
      nil ->
        opts

      userinfo ->
        auth_opts =
          case String.split(userinfo, ":", parts: 2) do
            [username] -> [username: username]
            [username, password] -> [username: username, password: password]
            _ -> []
          end

        Keyword.merge(opts, auth_opts)
    end
  end
end
